Oracc: HBTIN — Hellenistic Babylonia: Texts, Iconography, Names

OECT 09, 12 [Dowry gift of slave girl][via hbtin]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[mni-din]-⸢tu₄-d60⸣ [DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU A md60]-⸢DIN⸣iṭ A mḫun-zu-u₂ ina ḫu-ud lib₃-bi-šu₂

(o 1) Nidintu-Anu, son of Nanaya-iddin, son of Anu-uballiṭ, descendant of Hunzu, voluntarily has given Arrabanaʾ, his female slave, on whose right hand is written the name of Anu-šum-lišir, son of Anu-ah-iddin, as a marriage gift for Eṭirtu, his daughter, wife of Anu-ah-ittannu, son of Rihat-Anu, son of Anu-qišanni, descendant of Sin-leqi-unninni in perpetuity.

o 22

⸢f⸣ar-ra-ba-na-ʾa a-mat-su ša₂ ŠU-MIN 15-šu₂ a-na MU ša₂ md60-MU-GIŠ

o 33

DUMU ša₂ md60-ŠEŠ-⸢MU⸣ A mḫun-zu-u₂ šaṭ-rat a-na nu!-dun-nu-u₂ a-na

o 44

fe-ṭir-tu₄ DUMU.MUNUS-šu₂ DAM md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60 DUMU ša₂

o 55

md60-BAša₂-an-nu ⸢A m⸣d30-TI-ER₂ a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄

o 66

it-ta-din ⸢ul⸣ i-šal-⸢laṭ⸣-ma mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU

(o 6) Nidintu-Anu, son of Nanaya-iddin has no power of disposition (over) Arrabanaʾ, that slave, and has not transferred and will not transfer (her) for silver, gift, marriage gift, business venture (or) for any reason whatsoever to anyone other than Eṭirtu, his daughter, wife of Anu-ah-ittannu, son of Rihat-Anu.

o 77

far-ra-ba-na-ʾa a-mat MU-MEŠ a-na [KU₃].⸢BABBAR⸣ a-na ri-mut a-na

o 88

<nu>-dun-nu-u₂ a-na e-peš ṣu-bu-u₂-tu₂ a-na mim-ma gab-bi a-na <man>-am-ma

o 99

ša₂-nam-ma gab-bi e-lat fe-ṭir-tu₄ DUMU.MUNUS-šu₂ DAM md60-ŠEŠ-⸢MU⸣nu

o 1010

DUMU ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60 ul id-din ul i-⸢nam⸣-din u₄-mu pa-qa-ri ana muḫ-ḫi

(o 10) If a claim should arise concerning Arrabanaʾ, that slave, Nidintu-Anu, son of Nanaya-iddin, the giver of that same Arrabanaʾ, will clear the twelve-fold penalty and will pay (it) for Eṭirtu, his daughter, wife of Anu-ah-ittannu, son of Rihat-Anu in perpetuity.

o 1111

far-ra-ba-na-ʾa a-mat MU-MEŠ it-tab-šu-u₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-MU

o 1212

lu₂na-din-ʾu far-ra-ba-na-ʾa a-mat MU-MEŠ a-di 12-TA.AM₃ u₂-mar-raq-ma

o 1313

a-na fe-ṭir-tu₄ DUMU.MUNUS-šu₂ DAM md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu DUMU ša₂ mri-ḫat-d60 a-na u₄-⸢mu⸣

o 1414

ṣa-a-tu₄ i-nam-din far-ra-ba-na-ʾa a-mat MU-MEŠ ša₂ fe-ṭir-tu₄

(o 14) Arrabanaʾ, that slave, belongs to Eṭirtu, daughter of Nidintu-Anu, son of Nanaya-iddin, the wife of Anu-ah-ittanu, son of Rihat-Anu son of Anu-qišanni, descendant of [Sin-leqi-unninni in perpetuity.]

o 1515

DUMU.MUNUS ša₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂ mdna-na-a-⸢MU DAM md60-ŠEŠ-MU⸣nu DUMU [ša₂] ⸢mri-ḫat⸣-[d60]

o 1616

A md60-BAša₂-an-nu ⸢A md⸣[30-TI-ER₂ a-na u₄-mu ṣa-a-tu₄ ši-i]

Reverse
(witnesses)
r 11

lu₂mu-kin₇

(r 1) Witnesses:

1 line uninscribed
r 22

md60-ŠEŠ-GAL₂[ši DUMU ša₂ mki-din-d60 A mE₂.KUR-za-kir] md60-NUMUN-MU u md[60-NUMUN-GIŠ]

(r 2) [Anu-ah-ušabši, son of Kidin-Anu, descendant of Ekur-zakir]

(r 2) Anu-zer-iddin and Anu-zer-lišir, sons of [..., descendant of Ahʾutu]

r 33

DUMU-MEŠ ša₂ md[... A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu md60-ŠEŠ-MUnu] DUMU ša₂ mana-GAL-ka-d60

(r 3) [Anu-ah-ittan]nu, son of Ana-rabutika-Anu, descendant of Ahʾutu

r 44

A m⸢ŠEŠ⸣-[ʾu-u₂-tu₂ md60-NUMUN-MU DUMU ša₂ mša₂-d60-iš-šu-u₂ A mḫun-zu-u₂ x DUMU ša₂ md60-MU]-⸢li⸣GIŠ A! mḫun-zu-u₂

(r 4) [Anu-zer-iddin, son of Ša-Anu-iššu, descendant of Hunzu]

(r 4) [... son of Anu-šum]-lišir, descendant of Hunzu

r 55

md[... DUMU ša₂ x A mḫun]-zu-u₂ md60-ŠEŠ-MEŠ-MU DUMU ša₂

(r 5) [..., son of ... descendant of Hun]zu

(r 5) Anu-ahhe-iddin, son of [..., descendant of Hunzu]

r 66

m⸢d⸣[... A mḫun-zu-u₂ mni-din-tu₄-d60 DUMU ša₂] md60-ŠEŠ-MU

(r 6) [Nidintu-Anu, son of] Anu-ah-iddin, descendant of [Hunzu]

r 77

A m[ḫun-zu-u₂ x DUMU ša₂ mNUMUN-ia A m]⸢ŠU⸣-d60

(r 7) [... son of Zeriya, descendant of] Gimil-Anu

r 88

m ⸢li⸣[GIŠ DUMU ša₂ mNUMUN-ia DUMU ša₂ x A x] md⸢60⸣-DINiṭ DUMU ša₂

(r 8) Li[šir, son of Zeriya, son of ...]

(r 8) Anu-uballiṭ, son of Labaši, descendant of Ahʾutu

r 99

mla-⸢ba⸣-[ši A mŠEŠ-ʾu-u₂-tu₂ x DUMU ša₂ mBA]ša₂-a

(r 9) [..., son of Iqi]ša, descendant of Ekur-za[kir]

r 1010

A mE₂.KUR-⸢za⸣-[kir ... A mḫun]-⸢zu⸣-u₂

(r 10) [... descendant of Hun]zu

r 1111

mla-ba-⸢ši⸣ [... mlib]-luṭ DUMU ša₂

(r 11) Labaši [...]

(r 11) [Lib]luṭ, son of Na[naya-...]

r 1212

md⸢na⸣-[na-a-x ... md60-DIN]-⸢su⸣-E DUMU ša₂

(r 12) [...-balas]su-iqbi, son of Ša-[Anu-iššu, ...]

r 1313

mša₂-[d60-iš-šu-u₂? ...]1
